strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and still runs GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption (Green Map)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus a history of public talks, workshops, and community knowledge-sharing
concerns: Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategic leadership or advising executives and strategic customers
No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale — AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused, and there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field
Cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is solid but supporting rather than the deep cloud-platform strategy expertise the role centers on

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI strategy and recognized AI expertise

response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the experience-length and degree minimums and brings genuine breadth, craftsmanship, and entrepreneurial initiative, including recent hands-on work in AI-agent tooling. However, this is a director-level strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and experience influencing product direction and advising strategic customers — dimensions where the resume shows an accomplished senior/staff implementer rather than a principal-level strategist. The gap is in scope and AI depth, not competence.
